heading: Building for the National Museum of African American History and Culture
label: 80r–6 Building for the National Museum of African American History and Culture
notes: Procurement for Construction, , , provided in part:Pub. L. 112–74, div. E, title III125 Stat. 1033Dec. 23, 2011“That during fiscal year 2012 and any succeeding fiscal year, a single procurement for construction of the National Museum of African American History and Culture, as authorized under section 8 of the National Museum of African American History and Culture Act (), may be issued that includes the full scope of the project”.20 U.S.C. 80r–6
amendments: Procurement for Construction, , , provided in part:Pub. L. 112–74, div. E, title III125 Stat. 1033Dec. 23, 2011“That during fiscal year 2012 and any succeeding fiscal year, a single procurement for construction of the National Museum of African American History and Culture, as authorized under section 8 of the National Museum of African American History and Culture Act (), may be issued that includes the full scope of the project”.20 U.S.C. 80r–6

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Not later than 12 months after , the Board of Regents shall designate a site for the Museum.December 16, 2003

children.label: i
children.text: The Arts and Industries Building of the Smithsonian Institution, located on the National Mall at 900 Jefferson Drive, Southwest, Washington, District of Columbia.

children.label: ii
children.text: The area bounded by Constitution Avenue, Madison Drive, and 14th and 15th Streets, Northwest.

children.label: iii
children.text: The site known as the “Liberty Loan site”, located on 14th Street Southwest at the foot of the 14th Street Bridge.

children.label: iv
children.text: The site known as the “Banneker Overlook site”, located on 10th Street Southwest at the foot of the L’Enfant Plaza Promenade.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: A site described in subparagraph (B) shall remain available until the date on which the Board of Regents designates a site for the Museum under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Transfer to Smithsonian Institution
children.label: ii Transfer to Smithsonian Institution
children.text: Except with respect to a site described in clause (i) of subparagraph (B), if the site designated for the Museum is in an area that is under the administrative jurisdiction of a Federal agency, as soon as practicable after the date on which the designation is made, the head of the Federal agency shall transfer to the Smithsonian Institution administrative jurisdiction over the area.

children.label: i
children.text: The Chair of the National Capital Planning Commission.

children.label: ii
children.text: The Chair of the Commission on Fine Arts.

children.label: iii
children.text: The Chair and Vice Chair of the Presidential Commission referred to in .section 80r–8 of this title

children.label: iv
children.text: The Chair of the Building and Site Subcommittee of the Presidential Commission referred to in .section 80r–8 of this title

children.label: I
children.text: The Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate.

children.label: II
children.text: The Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives.

children.label: III
children.text: The Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives.

children.label: IV
children.text: The Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.

children.label: V
children.text: The Committee on Appropriations of the Senate.

children.heading: Construction of building
children.label: 2 Construction of building
children.text: The Board of Regents, in consultation with the Council, may plan, design, and construct a building for the Museum, which shall be located at the site designated by the Board of Regents under this paragraph.

children.heading: Nonapplicability of provisions relating to monuments and commemorative works
children.label: 3 Nonapplicability of provisions relating to monuments and commemorative works
children.text: Chapter 89 of title 40 shall not apply with respect to the Museum.
50 percent of the costs of carrying out this section from Federal funds; and
50 percent of the costs of carrying out this section from non-Federal sources.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section.
